name: Cash America
description_short: Cash America operates a network of pawn shops offering collateral-based loans, jewelry and precious metals buying, and merchandise sales across multiple locations.
description_long:
Cash America is an established pawn shop operator with a multi-location network accessible through their store locator and online browsing platform. The company specializes in the traditional pawn model where customers can leverage personal valuables—particularly jewelry, gold, and other collectibles—as collateral for short-term loans. Their website emphasizes a browsing experience centered on "treasures," suggesting both a lending and retail merchandise component typical of pawn operations.

The company offers core pawn shop services including collateral-based loans against personal items, direct purchase of gold and jewelry from customers, and retail sales of previously pawned or consigned merchandise. Their online platform allows customers to browse product categories and locate nearby store locations, modernizing the traditional pawn shop experience with digital tools.

Cash America differentiates itself through a multi-store network presence, suggesting established operational scale and brand recognition in the pawn industry. The website's emphasis on browsing categories and location-finding indicates investment in customer convenience and inventory transparency, moving beyond the stereotypical cash-only pawn shop model.

The primary limitation is that pawn loans are short-term solutions typically requiring repayment within 30-120 days, making them unsuitable for long-term financial needs. Like all pawn operations, this model requires customers to forfeit personal property if unable to repay, representing a higher-cost borrowing method compared to traditional personal loans or credit alternatives.
pros: Multi-location network provides geographic accessibility for customers seeking immediate collateral-based lending
Online store locator helps customers find nearby locations easily
Digital browsing platform allows customers to view merchandise and categories before visiting
Accepts a wide range of collateral items including jewelry, gold, and valuables
No credit check required—loan approval based on collateral value rather than creditworthiness
Fast funding typical of pawn operations for immediate cash needs
Retail merchandise component allows customers to purchase previously pawned items at discounted prices
cons: Short repayment terms (typically 30-120 days) create rollover risk and high effective annual interest rates, often 100-200% APR
Requires forfeiture of personal property if unable to repay, resulting in permanent loss of sentimental or valuable items
Limited to collateral-based lending model, unavailable to customers without acceptable personal property to pledge
Website content is minimal and provides limited transparency on rates, terms, and loan conditions
Pawn loans are significantly more expensive than traditional personal loans, credit union PALs, or payday alternatives under 36% APR
best_for: Customers with immediate short-term cash needs who own valuable jewelry, electronics, or collectibles
Individuals with poor credit unable to access traditional lending and willing to pledge collateral
People seeking quick liquidity for emergency expenses who can repay within 30-120 days
Bargain hunters interested in purchasing discounted previously-owned merchandise
diagnosis: Cash America is best for consumers with immediate short-term cash needs who own valuable collateral and have limited access to traditional credit. The primary caveat is that pawn loans carry very high effective interest rates (100-200%+ APR) due to short repayment terms, and borrowers risk permanent loss of pledged property; consumers should explore credit union PALs, emergency loans under 36% APR, or other alternatives before pawning valuables.
services: Electronics and valuables lending against collateral
Retail sale of previously pawned merchandise
Store location finder and online store locator
